paragraphs.text:
MATCH (i:IndexedBy)-[]->(e:Evaluate),
      (i:IndexedBy)-[:VertexIndexedBy]->(pp:ProductArgsNode)-[pR1:ProductRelationA]->(p:ProductArgsNode),
      (ii:IndexedBy)-[:VertexIndexedBy]->(p:ProductArgsNode)
WHERE i.N='5' AND i.MaxN='6' AND i.Dimension="8" AND i.RowCounter=4
Return i,count(pp)
